frequency: Every 4-6 hours (max 4g/day); NEVER give Aspirin/Ibuprofen/NSAIDs in dengue; Minimum 3-4 litres total fluid/day; oral rehydration hourly if tolerated; consider IV if cannot maintain oral intake; Twice daily (morning + evening); evidence-based for platelet recovery in dengue; Every 8 hours for vomiting; sublingual preferred if vomiting is severe. [Daily platelet count monitoring. HOSPITALISE if platelets <100,000 or any warning signs (bleeding, severe abdominal pain, rapid breathing). Duration: 13 days]
